zh.Bewsey Hall, Lancashire, England: 英國藍卡爾貝福 霍爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Alicia Garnet Baroness of Warrington於1200年出生在英國藍卡爾卡爾頓時，她的父親William de Gernet24歲，母親Cecily de Villiers20歲。她於大約1220年與Alberic Pincerna le Boteler在英國藍卡爾沃林頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1250年在英國藍卡爾貝福 霍爾享年50歲。

zh-hans.Bewsey Hall, Lancashire, England: 英国藍卡爾貝福 霍爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Alicia Garnet Baroness of Warrington于1200年出生在英国藍卡爾卡爾頓时，她的父亲William de Gernet24岁，母亲Cecily de Villiers20岁。她于大约1220年与Alberic Pincerna le Boteler在英国藍卡爾沃林頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1250年在英国藍卡爾貝福 霍爾享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: Garnet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Garnett
meanings: English (Lancashire, Westmorland, and Yorkshire): from a shortened form of the Old French personal name G(u)erinot, a diminutive of G(u)erin, a Central or Parisian Old French form of Werin or Warin (see Warren ). The development to Garnett is from the common late Middle English lowering of e to a before r + consonant.

nameMeanings.name: Alicia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Modern Latinate form of   Alice .  It was borne by the British ballerina  Alicia Markova  (born  Lilian Alicia Marks ,  1910–2004 ).

variants.name: Alisha
meanings: Modern Latinate form of   Alice .  It was borne by the British ballerina  Alicia Markova  (born  Lilian Alicia Marks ,  1910–2004 ).

meanings: Modern Latinate form of   Alice .  It was borne by the British ballerina  Alicia Markova  (born  Lilian Alicia Marks ,  1910–2004 ).

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Alicia Garnet Baroness of Warrington was born in 1200, in Carleton, Lancashire, England, her father, William de Gernet, was 24 and her mother, Cecily de Villiers, was 20. She married Alberic Pincerna le Boteler about 1220, in Warrington, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died in 1250, in Bewsey Hall, Lancashire, England, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Alicia Garnet Baroness of Warrington est née en 1200, à Carleton, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, William de Gernet, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Cecily de Villiers, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Alberic Pincerna le Boteler environ 1220, à Warrington, Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée en 1250, à Bewsey Hall, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Alicia Garnet Baroness of Warrington 1200 in Carleton, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William de Gernet 24 und ihre Mutter Cecily de Villiers 20. Sie hat um 1220 in Warrington, Lancashire, England Alberic Pincerna le Boteler geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb 1250 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Bewsey Hall, Lancashire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Alicia Garnet Baroness of Warrington è nata il nel 1200 nel Carleton, Lancashire, England, sua padre, William de Gernet, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Cecily de Villiers, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Alberic Pincerna le Boteler circa 1220, nel Warrington, Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1250, nel Bewsey Hall, Lancashire, England, all'età di 50 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Alicia Garnet Baroness of Warringtonが1200年にイギリスランカシュアイアカーレトンで生まれた時，父William de Gernetは24歳，母Cecily de Villiersは20歳であった。約1220年にイギリスランカシュアイアワーリントンでAlberic Pincerna le Botelerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1250年にイギリスランカシュアイアベウセイ ハルで50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Alicia Garnet Baroness of Warrington(이)가 1200년 영국 랭카실르 칼턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Gernet(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Cecily de Villiers(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 대략 1220년 영국 랭카실르 워링턴에서 Alberic Pincerna le Boteler(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1250년 영국 랭카실르 브w시 홀에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Alicia Garnet Baroness of Warrington nasceu em 1200, em Carleton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Gernet, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Cecily de Villiers, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Alberic Pincerna le Boteler aproximadamente 1220, em Warrington, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1250, em Bewsey Hall, Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 50 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Alicia Garnet Baroness of Warrington родилась в 1200 г. в местности карлетон, ланкашир, Англия, её отцу по имени William de Gernet было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Cecily de Villiers, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Alberic Pincerna le Boteler около 1220 г. в местности варрингтон, ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла в 1250 г. в местности бюси холл, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 50 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Alicia Garnet Baroness of Warrington nació en 1200, en Carleton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, William de Gernet, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Cecily de Villiers, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Alberic Pincerna le Boteler aproximadamente 1220, en Warrington, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1250, en Bewsey Hall, Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 50 años.
